name: Catch the roober
description: Put on your badge and clean up the streets in Catch the Robber! In this fast-paced action game, you play as a fearless sheriff chasing down a gang of red-masked thieves. Watch out—they are armed with giant loot bottles and ready to run! Use stealth and strategy to corner them, knock them out, and protect the town. Web Dev https://www.crazygamesonline.com/ With vibrant 3D graphics and addictive gameplay, justice is in your hands!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
